description.zh: 世界书/知识库插件，支持创建、编辑、启用/禁用世界书条目，并通过关键词或常驻激活自动注入到系统提示词或用户消息中。
description.en: World Book / Lorebook plugin for creating, editing, enabling, and disabling entries, with automatic prompt injection through keywords or always-active mode into system prompts or user messages.
description.default: World Book / Lorebook plugin for prompt injection

description.zh: 世界书条目的增删改查工具
description.en: CRUD tools for world book entries
